source_code:
# Simulates circular import in a single file
import sys
import types


def create_circular():
    mod_a = types.ModuleType('module_a')
    mod_b = types.ModuleType('module_b')
    sys.modules['module_a'] = mod_a
    sys.modules['module_b'] = mod_b

    # module_a: from module_b import B
    # module_b: from module_a import A (but A not defined yet)
    exec("from module_b import B\nclass A: pass\n", mod_a.__dict__)
    exec("from module_a import A\nclass B: pass\n", mod_b.__dict__)


def main():
    create_circular()
    from module_a import A
    print(A)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
